---
title: "Basiswissen digitale Numismatik"
filename: index
subtitle: "Welche Relevanz haben Forschungsdaten für die Numismatik?"
lang: de
date: today
date-modified: last-modified
date-format: "DD.MM.YYYY"
css: /assets/css/collage.css
---


{{< include digital_index_intro.qmd >}}


{{< include digital_index_exercise.qmd >}}


{{< include digital_index_quiz.qmd >}}
